## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
- [ ] No scraped third-party content committed (`videos/`, `knowledge_base/`, `dashboard/data/video/`)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` values committed
